title: Callista bairdiana
taxonomy: Callista bairdiana is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family Veneridae, which includes species commonly known as venus clams and tellins. The genus Callista is a group of marine bivalves with a wide distribution around the world. This classification is based on the species' physical characteristics and its taxonomic relationships with other bivalve mollusks. Further classification may also involve its order, class, and phylum.
uses: Callista bairdiana, a species of freshwater mussel, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
